name: File hash IOCs — endpoint file/process match
description: Match SHA256/SHA1/MD5 named in the article against EDR file/process telemetry.
note:
**Auto-generated from usecaseintel — analyst port-over required.** Original Splunk SPL / Defender KQL bodies preserved in the `reference` URL. Translate the source query to Elastic's ECS / EQL syntax before enabling.

### Source query (Defender KQL)
```
// Pre-filter each table BEFORE the union — the engine cannot push
// predicates across `union`, and DeviceFileEvents lacks ProcessCommandLine
// (Initiating only) so column-projection has to differ per side.
union
    ( DeviceFileEvents
        | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
        | where InitiatingProcessAccountName !endswith "$"
        | where SHA256 in~ (__HASH_LIST__) or SHA1 in~ (__HASH_LIST__) or MD5 in~ (__HASH_LIST__)
        | project Timestamp, DeviceName, ActionType, FileName, FolderPath, SHA256,
                  Cmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine, Source = "DeviceFileEvents" ),
    ( DeviceProcessEvents
        | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
        | where AccountName !endswith "$"
        | where SHA256 in~ (__HASH_LIST__) or SHA1 in~ (__HASH_LIST__) or MD5 in~ (__HASH_LIST__)
        | project Timestamp, DeviceName, ActionType, FileName, FolderPath, SHA256,
                  Cmd = ProcessCommandLine, Source = "DeviceProcessEvents" )
| order by Timestamp desc

```
